task_description: Fix two non-functional features: (1) Ad block recovery mechanism - SoftAdBlockMessage is imported but never rendered in layout.tsx, and AdBlockRecovery is not integrated. (2) Chatbot - Botpress requires unconfigured external URL, so create a floating AI chat widget using the existing built-in AI Financial Advisor pattern-matching logic to provide chat functionality site-wide.

verification.summary: npm run build passes (exit code 0, all 683+ pages compiled). No unit tests exist in project (only Playwright E2E which requires a running server). Docker not used. Implementation reviewed: FloatingChatWidget contains full pattern-matching chat logic, SoftAdBlockMessage is rendered in layout JSX.
